purpose: Own demo-only GraphConfig policy derived from controls, palette, scale, and interaction hooks.
invariants: This feature does not own graph data generation or render-loop lifecycle.
Graph interaction callbacks are passed in as explicit hooks.
Demo-space constants stay importable by generation, labels, replay, and graph-config code.
change_protocols: When adding a new demo visual knob, update DemoConfig first and then map it here.
When changing analyst zoom constants, verify work-mode zoom behavior manually.
Keep callbacks typed in DemoGraphConfigHooks instead of importing demo main state.
